race.comment: CENTU CAVADDI (4) looks well placed second up from a spell. He was kept safe first up at Bendigo but couldn't get into the race when ridden right back behind a handy one in Clever Trevor. Imagine this is a bit easier now with added fitness and he draws to sit a lot closer. IGOTCHA (11) struggled last time at Caulfield Heath but had been very good fresh and not far away at Warrnambool in the middle, both of which read well. She maps nicely and has claims. DEADLY PRESS (8) hasn't won this time in but is going quite well and should be thereabouts with Stackhouse booked. THE BANTAM (15) put in a solid effort last time at Echuca when charging home in a strongly run race. Doesn't win out of turn but could sneak into exotics. WILD RUBY (14) next best.
